creator: beebeetles@posteo.de
text:
I shall add that:

- this issues affect both 13.0-RELEASE-amd64 and 14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20220310. 

- Although the kernel trace message is different, but the zfs dataset that was destroyed (before the zpool was rendered un-importable) had deduplication turned on, similar to this bug [https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=172092].
